video_title: The Exposed Port That Got Them Owned

script_sections.text: One exposed port was all it took.
The attacker scanned the network, found the open service, and tested default credentials.
The compromise moved from internet edge to authentication to internal systems.
Detection time matters because every extra minute expands attacker options.

affiliate_mentions.reason: Stops credential reuse from turning into a breach.
affiliate_mentions.disclosure: Affiliate link may be included in the description.
